{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/bokeh/bokeh/issues/13101","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/bokeh/bokeh","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/bokeh/bokeh/issues/13101/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/bokeh/bokeh/issues/13101/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/bokeh/bokeh/issues/13101/events","html_url":"https://github.com/bokeh/bokeh/issues/13101","id":1685000803,"node_id":"I_kwDOADqB3M5kbxJj","number":13101,"title":"[FEATURE] `resources.CDN.render()`: do not include `bokeh-mathjax-x.y.z.min.js` when not needed","user":{"login":"jgehrcke","id":265630,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjI2NTYzMA==","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/265630?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/jgehrcke","html_url":"https://github.com/jgehrcke","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jgehrcke/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jgehrcke/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jgehrcke/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jgehrcke/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jgehrcke/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jgehrcke/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jgehrcke/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jgehrcke/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jgehrcke/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":1310697832,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWwxMzEwNjk3ODMy","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/bokeh/bokeh/labels/TRIAGE","name":"TRIAGE","color":"e2e2e2","default":false,"description":""}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2023-04-26T13:08:37Z","updated_at":"2023-04-26T13:08:37Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Problem description

I noticed that this is the largest resource loaded as part of loading/rendering an HTML doc that contains a Bokeh plot:
```
  <script type="text/javascript" src="https://cdn.bokeh.org/bokeh/release/bokeh-mathjax-3.1.0.min.js"></script>
```
It is ~500 kB compresses, ~1.8 MB uncompressed.

We use `bokeh.resources.CDN.render()` to include those `<script>` tags.

I was trying to understand if we actually need mathjax for displaying the plot in question or not. I was wondering if Bokeh tries to be smart about including this resource: does it only include it when needed? So, I was looking for

- General documentation on the question of dynamic assembly. Found no answer (maybe I wasn't looking properly).
- Then I was looking for API docs -- I thought I can maybe provide an argument to `render()` and somehow tell it to toggle including mathjax or so. Found no pointers.

I then assumed that most probably every Bokeh plot depends on this resource.

For testing, I manually inserted the JavaScript resources and left the mathjax one out. The plot renders fine. I think!

For the purpose of creating this ticket I assume that _not_ every plot requires this resource. And I wonder how Bokeh developers think about all this.



### Feature description

Aiming high: The (maybe utopic) feature request would be do make  `bokeh.resources.CDN.render()` do the right thing by default: include mathjax when needed, and not when not needed. Or maybe we can provide a `include_mathjax=False` method with corresponding docs?




### Potential alternatives

Minimal solution: I think potentially (if my assumption is correct) we may want to at least add a statement somewhere in the documentation where we recommend developers to try not including mathjax (if they care about bandwidth usage / page load latency etc).

### Additional information

Maybe I missed something here entirely. Curious about your feedback!
